title: PARA Workspace Architecture & Governance Standards (v1.7.x)
summary: Foundational architecture, governance, and efficiency standards for PARA Workspace v1.7.x. Covers: four-pillar structure (.para/, .agents/), Governing Kernel v1.5.3 (11 Invariants, 10 Heuristics incl. H10 KI), project.md schema v1.6.3 with field-gated I/O and @ecosystem/ path resolution, Ecosystem + Meta-Project types (v1.7.6), two-level Agent Index (workspace + project rules/skills with proactive trigger), Skills system v1.6.4 with /para-skill Co-Author workflow (v1.7.6) and Sidecar Skill pattern (v1.7.6.3), CLI with Smart Archive and catalog.yml governance, SYNC.md cross-project notifications, Knowledge System with platform-injected KI context (v1.7.0+), System KI governed lifecycle with template sync (v1.7.1), KR7 Ephemeral Reference Ban (v1.7.5), i18n docs/locales/ architecture (v1.7.6), orphan directory cleanup in installer (v1.7.6.3), Brainstorm Extract Paradigm with consent gate and 500-line threshold replacing Dual Output (v1.7.12), Brainstorm Sidecar Skill for just-in-time template loading (v1.7.12), VERSIONS.yml centralized version tracking replacing catalog version field (v1.7.13), preferences.date_format for content display dates (v1.7.13), anti-bulk-overwrite convention for governed library versions (v1.7.13), Cognitive Bypass Fix with Soft Dump payload in brainstorm/plan/docs (v1.7.9.1), and token optimization patterns (field-gated I/O, lazy-loading, strategy cascade). Covers 24 core workflows, 12 rules, and 7 skills.
